insertion_description: Insert a new second paragraph between the existing first paragraph (ending ‘Counting future supernatural events as confirmed predictions inflates the model’s scorecard.’) and the existing ‘Independent of the scientific critique above’ paragraph. Full replacement text available in EXP-174.json under the replacement_detail_verdict_text field; the inserted text alone is in new_paragraph_only.
summary: Neutralizes the 3/5 surviving defense from curmudgeon WIN-032.c3 advocate_mode: the dome advocate’s ‘you apply the unfalsifiability test asymmetrically’ argument. Patch acknowledges the kernel of truth (standard physics does contain currently-untestable extrapolations like black-hole interiors and pre-CMB cosmology) and then shows why the comparison fails: mainstream physics reports theoretical consequences separately from empirical confirmations and does not tally them in a headline accuracy ratio, while the dome site mixes WIN-032 with Schumann resonances in a single 94.5% score. Reframes the category error as scorecard design, not theology, consistent with our Pattern 6 / Scorecard-Inflation argument. Anticipates three likely counter-objections and answers each.
collision_fix_note: This proposal targets expansion file EXP-174.json (not EXP-172.json). The tracker originally queued this work as EXP-172 but an earlier analyst session had already written EXP-172.json for unrelated HNOTE-DOMAIN-001 content. Renumbering fix is documented in the separate proposal-collision-fix-EXP-172-173.json.
